subcodes.first_line: Praise be to the outspread court of the Most Exalted, Most Holy Presence of the Desired One, Who alone is worthy and befitting of His chosen ones [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد بساط مبسوطه ساحت امنع اقدس حضرت مقصودی را لایق و سزاست که از برای اولیا
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @prophecy and fulfillment, @praise and encouragement, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
